title: Meow or Never
description: Meow or Never is a small indie game about a cat and a Roomba who are best friends. After moving to a new place, they want to escape because they don't like it. Help the two friends get out.
reflection:
First ever game project. Only very limited programming skills at this point. I was the only person programming in this project but still pulled off quite a lot, for myself but also for my team. I was really determined not to fail my team and spent a lot of overtime on this.

This experience is still very dear to me because I was struggling with a lot of anxiety and self-doubt at this point in my studies, because everyone seemed to already have an extensive amount of experience in programming. I pulled it off in the end and felt such a sense of accomplishment that I knew this was definitely the path for me in the future.

It is currently the plan to continue working on this with my friends/teammates because the concept itself is interesting and, with my added expertise, I think I could really improve some beginner errors that I made the first time.
focus: Making it work with little experience
